testcase.name: Authentication › should register a new user

failure.message: auth.spec.ts:10:7 should register a new user

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/auth.spec.ts:10:7 › Authentication › should register a new user ─────────────────
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /\/dashboard/ Received string: "http://localhost:3001/register" Timeout: 15000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 15000ms 19 × unexpected value "http://localhost:3001/register"
29 | 30 | // Should redirect to dashboard after successful registration > 31 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/dashboard/); | ^ 32 | 33 | // Verify user menu is visible 34 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="user-menu"]')).toBeVisible(); at /Users/suhani/social-media-automation/tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts:31:24

testcase.name: Authentication › should login with valid credentials
Authentication › should show error with invalid credentials

failure.message: auth.spec.ts:58:7 should show error with invalid credentials

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/auth.spec.ts:58:7 › Authentication › should show error with invalid credentials ─
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="error-message"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="error-message"]') - waiting for" http://localhost:3001/login" navigation to finish... - navigated to "http://localhost:3001/login"
67 | 68 | // Should show error message > 69 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="error-message"]')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 70 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="error-message"]')).toContainText(/invalid credentials/i); 71 | }); 72 | at /Users/suhani/social-media-automation/tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts:69:65

testcase.name: Authentication › should logout successfully
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/auth.spec.ts:73:7 › Authentication › should logout successfully ─────────────────
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/dashboard**" until "load" navigated to "http://localhost:3001/login" navigated to "http://localhost:3001/login" ============================================================
at support/helpers/auth-helper.ts:34
32 | 33 | // Wait for redirect to dashboard > 34 | await this.page.waitForURL('**/dashboard**', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 35 | } 36 | 37 | /** at AuthHelper.login (/Users/suhani/social-media-automation/tests/support/helpers/auth-helper.ts:34:21) at AuthHelper.loginAsTestUser (/Users/suhani/social-media-automation/tests/support/helpers/auth-helper.ts:59:5) at Object.authenticatedPage (/Users/suhani/social-media-automation/tests/support/fixtures/index.ts:95:5)

testcase.name: Authentication › should protect dashboard route when not authenticated
